name: Turkish Sea Bass
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds sea bass fillets (4 to 6 pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine garlic, olives, oregano, basil and parsley.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Heat oil in a large baking dish at 425 degrees F for 1 minute.
4. Spread olive mixture evenly over the bottom of the baking dish.
5. Arrange sea bass, skin side up, on top.
6. Pour vegetable stock around fillets or dry white wine.
7. Bake, basting occasionally with juices, until done.
8. To serve, arrange fillets and olive mixture on heated serving plates.
Origin: Chef Hassan Emre, Topkapi Hotel, Istanbul, Turkey
